Ticket.subject: Performance inadequate for second consecutive week
Seeking guidance on electrical wiring installation for GC5060
Customer service for portable generators needs beefing up
Mechanical maintenance guidelines for generator misleading
Repeated motor breakdown while shutting off
Starting up generator consumes excessive power
Delay in installation; spare parts unavailable
Cannot start generator after electrical failure
Generator GC3060 platform structure is weakening
Signal panel on GC5060 blinks intermittently
